---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| output: asis

# ── Helper: read optional metadata from paintings.yml ─────────────────────────
yml_path <- "paintings.yml"

meta_map <- list()
if (file.exists(yml_path)) {
  raw <- yaml::read_yaml(yml_path)
  for (entry in raw) {
    if (!is.null(entry$file)) {
      meta_map[[entry$file]] <- entry
    }
  }
}

# ── Scan images folder ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
imgs <- list.files(
  "images/paintings",
  pattern    = "\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp|JPG|JPEG|PNG|WEBP)$",
  full.names = FALSE
)

# ── Render gallery HTML ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if (length(imgs) == 0) {
  cat('<p class="gallery-empty">
        Add images to <code>images/paintings/</code> and re-render.
      </p>')
} else {
  cat('<div class="gallery-grid">\n')

  for (img in imgs) {
    m       <- meta_map[[img]]
    title   <- if (!is.null(m$title))  m$title  else tools::file_path_sans_ext(img)
    year    <- if (!is.null(m$year))   as.character(m$year) else ""
    medium  <- if (!is.null(m$medium)) m$medium else ""

    # Build a clean description string
    desc_parts <- c(year, medium)
    desc_parts <- desc_parts[nchar(desc_parts) > 0]
    desc       <- paste(desc_parts, collapse = " &middot; ")

    cat(sprintf(
      '<a class="gallery-item glightbox"
          href="images/paintings/%s"
          data-gallery="paintings"
          data-glightbox="title: %s; description: %s">
        <img src="images/paintings/%s" alt="%s" loading="lazy">
        <div class="gallery-overlay">
          <span class="gallery-title">%s</span>
          %s
        </div>
      </a>\n',
      img,
      title,
      desc,
      img,
      title,
      title,
      if (nchar(desc) > 0) sprintf('<span class="gallery-desc">%s</span>', desc) else ""
    ))
  }

  cat('</div>\n')
}
```
